title: On the Sunny Side
writer: Oscar Hemberg, Helge Krog, Gösta Stevens
actors: Lars Hanson, Ingrid Bergman, Karin Swanström
plot: Eva Bergh works as a bank clerk, but dreams of becoming an artist. At a party she meets the rich Harald Ribe and he instantly falls in love with her. When he proposes to marry her she has no work or place to live and she accepts. ...
